🚀 Big Launches.title: OpenAI files confidentially for IPO
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI has confidentially submitted a Form S-1 with the US Securities and Exchange Commission, following Anthropic's decision to do the same.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Apple announces Siri AI and its next generation of Apple Intelligence
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Apple has revealed a new set of AI features and a smarter, more personalized Siri.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Amazon is launching AI-generated custom merch
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: Amazon is expanding its print-on-demand features to AI-generated designs created using Alexa for Shopping.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: PathoSage: Towards Multi-Source Evidence Adjudication in Pathology via Experience-Aware Agentic Workflow
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Researchers propose a multimodal large language model for computational pathology, addressing challenges in reliable patch-level reasoning.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: OmniMem: Perturbation-aware Memory Compression for Streaming Audio-Visual LLMs
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A memory-efficient streaming framework is proposed for audio-visual large language models, addressing limitations in long-video inference.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Microsoft’s AI chief says superintelligence is near, but won’t take your job
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Microsoft's AI chief discusses the potential of superintelligence and its impact on the job market.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: NotebookLM’s Gemini 3.5 upgrade adds a cloud computer and help finding sources
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Google's NotebookLM AI-powered note-taking app is updated with a cloud computer and improved information retrieval.

tool_of_day.title: Amazon Alexa for Shopping
tool_of_day.summary: Amazon's AI-powered shopping feature allows users to create custom merchandise designs using text prompts.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more practical applications, with companies like Amazon and Apple focusing on user-friendly AI features, while OpenAI and Anthropic prepare for their respective IPOs.
